title: Recipes
scope: Family recipe collection: create, browse, search, and manage recipes with structured ingredients, steps, categories, and images, plus printing to the household printer. NOT meal-idea selection (the Meals app) — Recipes owns the full ingredients-and-steps detail.

specs.title: Create a recipe
specs.behavior: Creating records a recipe with structured ingredients and steps.

specs.title: Get a recipe
specs.behavior: Getting returns a recipe's full details — ingredients, steps, and metadata.

specs.title: List recipes
specs.behavior: Listing returns recipes, optionally filtered by category or creator.

specs.title: Search recipes
specs.behavior: Searching matches recipes by title, description, or ingredients.

specs.title: Update a recipe
specs.behavior: Updating changes only the supplied fields of a recipe.

specs.title: Create a category
specs.behavior: Creating adds a new recipe category.

specs.title: Print a recipe
specs.behavior: Printing sends a recipe to the default physical printer.
